star_1.text: Editing my original review because the game no longer carries over your score, and there are way too many ads. It was a fun game, but now I'm deleting. It was fun until level 1000. I don't think the game accounts for quadruple digits, as it only gives you 100 points per tier after hitting that level. Also, the update caused the levels to shorten, and made the game a lot easier. Still a good game to kill time with.

I was really enjoying this game.  However, the ads were just overwhelmingly annoying.  I actually enjoyed the game enough that I purchased the "No ads" upgrade.   However, I still received ads.  I restarted the app several times to no avail.  I also looked on the play store to see if there was, perhaps, an "Ad Free" version or something like that which I had indirectly purchased.  Short version:  Far too many annoying ads in this game.  Unable to actually purchase "No Ad" version, even though I was charged $2.49 for the "upgrade."  Would not recommend.

Update: I downloaded & tried out the game AGAIN. The invasion of ads is THE WORST I've ever seen anywhere! Pop-up while ur playing game AND forces u to watch ads in between levels too! That's just way too much. if I wanted to see ads or have someone try to sell me something, I'd go watch the QVC channel! Previous review; Used to be tolerable, but now theres WAY too many ads!!!!

Enjoyed the game. Bought the ad free version, but the ads never disappeared. I even waited a day or two thinking it might just take time to process my purchase, but the ads remain. Tried uninstalling and reinstalling, still ads. Emailed the developer, no response after about a week. Now I have to try and get my money back.

I loved this game, it was very fun, and it had these green arrows, that made you go down faster, which makes the game very fun! Then one day, my brother accidentally deleted it, and when I read downloaded it, it didn't have the green arrows, and the control would stick, which would make you go on the opposite color, and obviously you would lose, now that I am on level 28, it still has the same issues, in my opinion, the game is no longer fun for me. And I can't even go on to the settings, because it does not let me.😤☹😖😠 Sincerely, A very upset customer.

Not enough space to explain all of the problems, but the basic issue is the developers. They dont respond to ANYTHING. Pay them and you still get ads. Unlock almost everything, but 300 levels later still can't get the last ball. Won't tell you what skins are in this game. Then all my progress gets deleted. STOP UPDATING! YOU JUST SCREW IT UP MORE. GET SOMEONE COMPETENT TO PROGRAM YOUR GAME. Rant over. Update: playing a video to continue the level after hitting the wrong color does nothing.

I want to say, first I really enjoyed this game but there's reasons I gave it a 1.....first off this company is a scam. Idc if it was only 2.49, but u pay to remove ads, what do u expect to happen? The ads to be gone.....NOPE. the other thing that annoyed me, can't unlock the last ball. Says to unlock 5 of them, well I have and still no ball....very disappointed

I really wanted to like this. The rate of video ads is absolutely ridiculous. Ridiculous. Why you could not let the player enjoy the game for even 5 minutes before showing an ad is beyond me. I beat the first level in literally seconds and an immediately. The following repetition of ads in the next three minutes was yes, ridiculous. Uninstalled immediately.

I got nostalgic for this game, unfortunately now, you basically watch more ads than you do actually playing the game. The ads are atrocious, you'll get an ad every time you win, every time you die, every time you progress, it doesn't matter! It 100% ruins all the fun when I have to skip an ad DURING THE ACTUAL GAMEPLAY! Also, airplane mode won't work because the app "needs" wifi just to run the ads... The only fun part was the boss levels, but I gave up around level 30. Do not download this 👎👎

Won't even get past the title card, when it does the game just freezes and crashes. During the title card it just plays a squishy sound over and over again, even continues to play the sound once the game is closed. I am playing on a Moto Z Play, hardware should not be an issue. Edit: The issues seems to have been resolved, slightly. Still runs slows as if its unoptimised for my device. Too many ads, makes it impossible to play the game. Second chance doesn't work.

You can't get the ads to go away even if u purchase the game. It is the most annoying thing on the planet to be playing an interesting game and to get 3 add popups and videos you can't skip. Even after I purchased the game the ads wouldn't go away. It is not worth the purchase. It is an awesome game but it is completely destroyed by ads.

This game is horrible. The only reason why I hate this game is because there's to many ads. When you die there's obviously going to be an ad, when you complete a level, theres always an ad. When you watch a video to get a second chance, it shows you an ad then NOTHING!!!1! (I haven't tried the premium version yet because I don't trust it since most of the game is a commercial.)

I used to LOVE this game, but that was before the update. Now I'm stuck on a platform that doesn't move, and I can't get any of my old progress back. There's also a number next to it that seems to be the level, but it's way lower than my previous level, reading 54 instead of 467. It's really upsetting that this has happened to me along with many other players, and uninstalling will just lead to the loss of all of the progress already made in the game. Please fix this.

Can't play the game after latest update. So now I have an app on my phone that is literally a bouncing ball on a fancy platform. I really don't want to uninstall and lose all my progress! I'm disappointed and annoyed that this issue has been going on for at least a couple of months and yet no word or statement from the creators acknowledging the problem and when they are going to fix it!

It's a fun game and exactly the game you think it is. Sadly there are ads after everything you do. Every level you win or lose it plays an ad afterwards. It even plays ads in a little tiny square on the screen while your playing too. It's hard to play a game that's all about making money from ads. It's sad to see phone games have become nothing but money grabs from ads nowadays.

I paid the $2.50 for no ads and it's a RIP off. I'm still getting ads. Loads of ads. How do I get my money back? If I pay for no ads I expect to get what I paid for or I should get a refund! oh and thanks to the new update I've been stuck on the "main" page with no response from the game just a ball bouncing on a cartoonish level. after still having ads, no refund, no response from developers. I'm uninstalling this app/game. it's not worth the space its taking up on my phone.

It used to be a really fun game but the ads make it unplayable. After every level you get an ad, before every level you get an ad, want to check the leaderboard? AD. You can't even go offline to get rid of them because it now requires internet connection unless you buy the no ad version. It is a simple game, I'm not paying to play it in the car bc they are too money hungry to not show an ad every 30 seconds.

Okay, so I used to be OBSESSED with this game. It was so much fun and very addicting. In fact, I was on level 1,327 (That just shows how much I liked it.) But recently I got a new update or something? It turns into a candy-themed level and just freezes. It's super annoying and makes the game unplayable. I don't want to delete the app because once again I was on a really high level & don't wanna restart. So all in all, it was a fun game, but I'm really disappointed in its update.

Paid for no ads, GUESS WHAT?! Nothing changed. I paid for it twice and its still the same with no help to fix or change. Im adding everything here bc the "tell us more" doesnt open. Not to mention it freezes and glitches. Reinstalled a few times. I think the only choice I have left is to give up my $5& some change and uninstall the game for good :-(

I paid for the No Ads version, and I still am plagued with banner ads, and after 3 or 4 attempts, I have to watch and wait for 2 consecutive different ads to offer the "X" button at the top corner of the screen before I am back to being able to play the game. And then after 3 or 4 plays, more ads. I would like a refund. Which I doubt will happen. I love this game. But I paid 3 bucks for an ad free game and I was ripped off

star_2.text: The graphics and gameplay are good. The problem is with the ads...surely the developers didn't have to cripple the player base so hard with the super intrusive, FULL SCREEN ads, with auto playing audio and video? The amount of times I click on a sudden pop up ad instead of a button in the game I wanted to click... *Sigh* . I hope the deal the devs signed with the advertisement companies was worth it for them. I would give this game a 4/5 easily but the choice for the ads they went with severely cuts the enjoyment and replayable of this game well down.

I hate the "bonus levels" the only way to get a high score would be until you messed up. But now it's the bonus levels (that arent even fun.) If there was a way to disable them and go back to the old way then I'd give this game a 4 star rating. Also, the ad problem. Theres so many ads between each round that I had to turn on airplane mode because of the ads🙄 But game play is fun, other then when I DONT ACTUALLY LAND ON THE BAD POINTS💀 and they count it. Overall, it's a decent game ig

It's a lot of fun to play. I find it kind of soothing to just go through the motions. And, while I do understand the need for ads in a free game that doesn't have in app purchases, I mostly find the content of the ads themselves annoying. While some are just for other games, most seem to be people wearing too much make up lip sinking to songs and thinking they're talented for it. Don't get me wrong, if you do that for fun, cool. But it just gets annoying seeing it again, and again, and again. Also, why does it ask for access to phone calls and location? I get the media thing, and I do like that you can of course choose not to give acess and play the game, but I find the fact it asks at all a bit unnerving. I have also noticed that within the comments, the people who have made the game recurrently fail to contact anyone. This is unnerving as well and leads me to believe the ones who have made this game do not care wether they made something good and/or about the people who use their content. Sorry for the really long review

TOO MANY ADVERTISEMENTS! The game literally is a scam and a cash grab, this is too trash for me, first of all. The advertisements, they're everywhere before and after the game. Hell, they even come up during the game! It's kinda bulls£|{ if I say so myself. I'm fine with ads popping up on top but this is too extreme. Second of all, the lag. It's fu€{|ng common as hell when I play it. I'm just playing the game and God decides to punish me with lag. That's all I have to say. Don't download.

ingame ads....jesus these really get in the way. half the time they practically guarantee a straight fail because you cant move your finger over far enough not to block the ball because theres an ad there that you might accidentally hit. not even worth it to pay for no ads when they do that to begin with. they're just doing that to increase the chances of someone buying the ad free version. the game is fun without the annoying ads but otherwise the overlay one just runs the experience

I decided to buy the no ads version because it was getting old fast like everyone has said. I also find it kinda shady that I believe the world leaderboard is fake. I see the same names over again on it, and I already made it to number 1 in the world just after playing it for about a week. After I made it to number 1 it resets me back to 1000 something which is also strange. I feel like I got a perfect score, so I don't really know what to do now. Ok game if you just want to pass the time.

I have been playing this game for nearly a week now I in need to write a review on the app. The game LAGS, this game is not resource intensive, the ads are causing to game to lag constantly. I have an Samsung s7 active, so it's a nice phone that should not be lagging on a game like this. There are way to many ads, there is an add every two deaths not to mention an add that is always running at the bottom of the screen. Fix the lag and I'll give a three. The graphics are nothing special and the gameplay seems the same as everyother game you see kids in high school playing.

I went in finally after seeing hundreds of ads and when I finally start the game, I'm hit with three or four ads before even starting a round. I feel as much as you focus on advertising yourselves, that you need to rely on ads every five seconds removes any level of immersion. What more I figure you do it to force people to purchase the ad free patch which is very poor practice. I want to like your game, however in order for me to like it, there needs to be more incentive than ads every three to five seconds. This cheap trick gets old and shows you do not care about the consumer. When you make your game about how good your game is and not about how much you can steal from a simple person's pocket, I'll give you guys another chance. Until then I can not condone your practice.

It's ok. But the ads are just too much. After almost every level there's an ad. Also, what is up with these audio advertisements??? They're so sudden and they interrupt your gameplay and make you wait 5 seconds just to skip it. Overall the game is fine, but incase you couldn't tell already, main problem, ADS.

The game is difficult and unforgiving. My only motive to do my best and not die in this game was that on most deaths you would be forced to watch an ad. When offered a second chance and start the game where you died, you have to watch an ad but if you wanted to restart the level you would still have to watch the ad. Ads and the complexity along with its unforgiving nature make this game very irritating and a waste of time. YOU WILL SPEND MORE TIME ON ADS THAN PLAYING THE GAME.

Fun and all but paid to remove ads and still get them constantly. The ads are intrusive and aggressive, basically forcing a click. Sometimes I cant even get out of them without restarting the game and losing the streak. That kills the whole vibe. Restore purchases literally does nothing, just a dead button. Poor programming is evident throughout. Filing for a refund.

Unless you're willing to pay $2. 50 to get rid of the ads I don't recommend 
you download this because it is a most annoying thing when you're playing 
and after you finish a level or something you get and ad pops up or before 
you start you getting an ad pops. They flood this game with ads and I'm too 
stubborn to give in and pay the 250 because I feel like that's exactly what 
they want but man I enjoy this game but the amount of ads is ridiculous.

This game is terrible, yet addictive. Helix Jump is fun for a little bit, or if you pay for the no ads feature. But this only brings it to three stars, due to how glitchy it is, and the random deaths you will get. I am on level 43, and it just gets worse, the time after you watch an ad, has the chance to not respond for a few seconds which will later kill you. This game is fun, and is a great time killer, but be warned about how poorly coded it is.

Too many ads, buddy. The game concept is cool but having an ad every three to four games isn't cool with such game. Apart that it makes the player slugish about it, the ads are way longer than the time it takes to play. The controls are sensitive resulting in bad controls and "dying" quicker, and you don't even get a "reward" for finishing the level because after you get even another ad! It's really not cool for such a nice game idea.

This game is a great concept and pretty fun. However, it's pretty glitchy. Turning the pillar thing quickly will let you go through a wall and getting a green boost too close to the goal will make the goal disappear and you fall forever. These glitches are also very common and are quite annoying. There are also way too many ads popping up all the time. If these and some others were fixed this would be a great game.

(I previously posted a review only a couple days ago and it seems to have been deleted, as I would like this to be addressed I am rewriting my review.) The game it addicting and fun. The only problems I have found are the glitches and the ads. Normally I don't mind ads but there's so many that just pop up, sometimes mid-gameplay. I even PAID for the ads to go away and they're still there. It won't even let me me re-pay for the ads. I wasted money on something that doesn't work, please fix!

We can all understand the desire for ad revenue in free games.  But, ads were at least 50% of my time trying this game through four levels and were sometimes confusing - a couple times the ads appeared to be part of the game.  Some ads literally popped up at the start of a new level and distracted from play. Seems like a nice concept, but this free version is not enjoyable from the complete bombardment of ads, unfortunately.

**the latest update BLOWS.** i used to enjoy this game constantly, but since the last update, it isn't playable. it opens with two voodoo logos, and then a ball going down some fancy looking'menu/main screen'? it looks very nice, but i can't move or do anything. i can't click, move, nothing. you've made your own game unplayable. 👏 PLEASE fix it, i keep trying to open the game to play when I'm bored and have to be reminded that it's UNPLAYABLE!! 😿

I think there was TOO MANY ads that every time you completed a level or died you would get a ad. This is not only interrupting you while playing but it is also very, very annoying. It's so stupid that you dont fix it!! I hate when people do that. FIX THE ADS! Then I think there will be more people playing the game and will be satisfied, but till then, I dont like it and will not play until fixed...

The game itself is pretty awesome.... But the ads... The bloody ads! Even AFTER PAYING for the game... There is STILL a bar ad when playing the game and MANDATORY view of a video. In between playing the game. When you make the purchase you are told that; for rewards, you have to view videos. If it is just a a reward why am I forced to watch a ad?? 😠😠

star_3.text: What is the point of watching an ad for a "second chance" if you're going to force us to restart from the beginning anyway? If I watch an ad, I should restart from the tier I died on. Not the top tier. I've tried this game on other devices and it's always the same. That needs to be fixed. Also, I understand the need for sponsors, but must there be an ad every other level? You also die even when you don't hit a red zone. How very annoying.

The game is a great time killer. My family has a bit of a competition over it. I would actually give the game 5 stars however.... I paid, and was charged, to remove ads. They cause glitches that are irritating and are way to frequent. I still have ads after paying. I emailed the developer and never got a reply. I'm disappointed in the company.

This app deserves at least a three star from me but there were some things that made me want to rate this 2 star. First, it constantly shows you a ad every 2 times you die. Second, the first time I saw a ad it was about the game i was playing helix jump, " yeah it showed an ad about its self". Lastly, the levels are pretty hard saying you just started the game. You would need to be pretty good at the game to get far enough in the game

i like the game. it's a fun way to pass time if you've got nothing to do or like to be occupied while you watch tv. my main complaints are the number of ads. there's way too many and even one that sometimes plays an audio add mid level. also, i don't like the implementation of "leagues" because they're various obviously just made up stats used to make you feel better about your gameplay. once you reach diamond, theres no more leauges, and you just keep being bumped back down to 400th place.

The game is awesome, and addictive!!! I took away stars because there are wayyyyy too many ads. Simple solution is to pay for the upgrade for the ad free version, right? Wrong! When I pay for an ad free game, I should her an ad free game. I paid for the upgraded version and there is still an ad after every freaking level. Don't waste your money on the ad free guys.

It's a cool game. It's a good time waster. When your bored you can just play this. But it can get you pissed off and want to chuck your phone across the room. And theres one scam in the game. When you die it says you can watch a video to continue. But when you watch a video it just restarts. They make you watch an ad for nothing. And they're getting money off of it when your just sitting there thinking what the point of that was.

I'd give it 5 stars if one issue was fixed. After you fail a level, you can get an extra "life" by watching an ad. After that so is over, you normally start on a platform with no red so you don't automatically fail. However, often times after a 30 second ad, I go to start my new life and fall straight to the red and fail. It's incredibly frustrating and almost feels intended. Had to uninstall, but good luck with the game!

The game is great! It could even be addicting, but the ads are ridiculous! After 3 deaths or one extended gameplay TWO separate ads appear. It's annoying and I can't enjoy the game. Plus the payment to get rid of the ads is overpriced for a simple game like this. Not worth it, but it's a good concept though. Could be addicting, but ya know. Ads suck!

I like the concept and the gameplay. My only problem are the ads. Don't get me wrong, I know that ads are a normal things in free games but in this one, they're quite excessive. It also dosen't help how in some you're force locked into them or have to press the ad to "disable" it. Overall, game is fun and great but too many ads.

Fun game! I am currently on level 689, and am planning to finish typing and then go play till 700.The game doesn't progress to get harder. For me, level 1 and level 687 were almost identical. Another down fall is if you jump once it goves you the amount of what level you are on ,but if you jump more than once it gives you much less. There may be a reason, but I think it is just a fault or way to prevent high scores.

You will be dry raped by the onslaught of long, loud, and boring ads in the free version. I paid for no ads, but then lost the game mechanic of second chances as a result. I'm over level 100 and just read a review from a guy who is over 500...no end in sight! Not to mention the levels don't get any more challenging. Good for the short run, but I'm over it now.

I used to love this game and would have given it 5 stars. Then a few months ago, I started noticing this glitch after I would press the "second chance" button. After watching the ad to get my second chance, I would move the board to go down a platform and the ball would shrink to go down instead of the game readjusting to keep the ball at the same place on the screen. Now, if I don't complete a level all at once, it's almost impossible to finish the level using a second chance.

Yes, it is fin and addicting, and I like the game. But there are SOOO many ads, the game isn't any fun anymore. I mean, there are more ads than gametime! On the firse 3 or so levels there aren't any ads. But I reached lv5 and it was ads, ads, ads, and more ads. I'm probably going to uninstall the game unless this problem is fixed. Soon. Also, if you keep the ads, make it mlre of a variety of ads. I mean, it shows the same ad over and over again. So, you are going to lose an installer. Fix this!!

This game is a lot of fun. I would rate 5 stars, but i have a few issues. I understand games have ads, but the ads in this game are excessive. Not only that but sometimes when i watch for a second chance it doesn't actually give me a second chance. It just says tap to restart. I don't care to watch ads but after every play is a little much.

Third Review: When I first started playing this game years ago, the score counter would continue to count your score and wouldn't reset until you finally failed to make it to the bottom of a level. Now, the score counter resets and the beginning of each level. There is no point in having it, plus the Best score displayed, if it resets at every level. It is essentially pointless to play this game anymore.

I think it's a good concept for a game however the execution was carried out poorly and clumsily. I think that it is difficult to move the tower the ball is falling down, but that's not the main problem... it's the ads! Every few seconds there is an advertisment popping up on the screen. I think that is difficult to play because of these issues, I suggest reducing the amount of ads to only 1 after each stage. I've also read that people have been getting scammed during the no ads purchase.

I want to preface with this game is fun and addicting, and it does kill time very well. When the skins were added I had already satisfied the conditions to unlock all but two skins and the last skin requires me to unlock 5 skins. It does not count the skins that were auto unlocked. Also slow down is a real problem in this game. It lags whenever you move too fast. Lastly I feel like the game scoring higher as you go makes it so you dont have to do better to get a high score.

it's fun, but gets boring when constantly playing it since the only thing that really changes is the colors, I think it would be cooler if the ball and surroundings would change not only becoming more difficult, but also brighter colors and shapes you wouldn't expect. ( like if the ball was a cheeseburger and the bass that the ball jumps on could be a pizza and it changes with each level) ps: Helix Jump is still a good game.

Ok, its a good game, but it's really laggy when you log in every time you go to play it, and it takes a few minutes to smooth out. It will also randomly take you to the app store, or some random website, even when you X out of the add, also, prenium mode doesnt get rid of any adds.

The game has good graphics and stuff but WAY TOO MANY ADS! I get one every single time I touch the opposite color! The ads get annoying and makes the game play slower. VOODOO, I understand you have to ads to keep the game free but PLEASE decrease the number of ads! It will ruin your game! 😣 Take my advice or let the reviews go DOWN! It is your game and your choice!

star_4.text: The game is very addicting and a great time killer. It has has many levels, I actually got to level 100 before deleting the game. Although, it was pretty boring after a while and the colors were repetitive. There were way too many adds also. Like, I understand occasional advertisement, but this was honestly ridiculous. Overall it was a pretty good game.

I love this game!! I'm always playing it on my down time. I have reached as far as level 1222. This game was very fun and addictive however, after recent updates I realized that the powerups that may automatically jump you 10 levels or so can also glitch the game. If you are too close to the final level, and you use the given powerups, the last level will break along with the other and then there will be no way to end the game. I encounter this problem daily. I still love this game, very much.

Should give 3 stars due to all the ads. But it's a really Fun game, it just has way to many 10-30 sec ads. U get a few tries & then another ad. u spend more time watching ads then u do playing the game. I gave 4 stars cuz it's really fun but the amount of ads are REALLY way to many. I'd give 5 stars if they would let u play the game with just ads between levels which would be a more reasonable amount of ads, or after 8-10 tries. I'm thinking about uninstalling game even though it's fun, because I get annoyed w/ads & don't play as long or often as I want to because of them. I choose other games with less ads that I can actually play. But it is a really fun game, sad the ads ruin it.

The is a great game and a great time killer. Perfect for down time at work or in between matches of your favorite multiplayer game. The only reason I rate it 4 is because there is a bug that I run into pretty consistently. Almost every time I boot it up, I'll run get a glitch where grabbing the arrow power up will cause the platforms to stop spawning, including the one that ends the stage. So you're stuck falling forever. But after a restart, the bug is fixed. So not huge, but frustrating.

The game and graphics are great! I was originally looking for a game where there aren't a limit of lifes, balls, chances, etc. And I didn't want a game that required internet connection! So this is the perfect game for me! The only issue is the amount of ads. There are far too many! Every 2 or 3 turns, there is an add. I get that most games have ads but not that many... Anyway, other than that, great game! 😄👍

It's a pretty good game. I'd definitely recommend it, great time killer. I have found a few bugs with the skins and green arrows that you touch to go down platforms, however it doesn't effect the gameplay, so it's still a fully functional game. I'd describe it as addicting. The amount of ads are tolerable. I usually get an ad every 2-4 levels, which isn't much compared to other mobile games. I'm already on level 98, and it doesn't feel repetitive even though it's the same thing repeating.

They've made it way too easy. My previous high score was 187k. I just made 435k last game. Those little green boost arrows are freakin everywhere now. It's hard enough to die that I really lose interest before that happens. I don't think I'll play this game much anymore. Also, the score is meaningless because the game just creates random levels as you play. It's not like there are a finite # of levels that increase in difficulty. Just an infinity of randomly generated ones.

I really like Helix jump. I play all the time at school because it is an offline game and my friends play it. We check everyday to see who is at a higher level. It is a good game for people who like a challenge and can concentrate. When you are on wifi, it can be a little laggy. I have also detected a bug; the long red wall can be escaped. If you go through the top of it quickly, it dosent kill you.

Literally, people complain about ads popping up every two attempts, if you're so annoyed then turn off the internet, it won't happen that again if you do that. The game also works faster that way. I think the game is really good, it's a great time killer, simple, and honestly not rage too rage inducing, sure the levels could be a bit hard but that's the fun of it, you actually feel like you're accomplishing something.

Firstly, I thiink this game is addicting and enjoyable. However, the reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is because, due to the power ups which can cause you to skip multiple helix's, I sometimes fall through the bottom helix. I have to close the game and reset my score in order to fix that. This is really annoying, and I hope the creators fix this issue, because it's been in the game for a while.

This game is addicting but super annoying. Ads, the damn ads, everytime i lose theres an ad every time i win theres an ad, and the ads are long most of the time then if i chose to get a second chance and watch an ad for that, it will pick me up where i left off but will automatically move for me and land me in the squishy part making me automatically die and have to do it again and watch another ad. Not to mention, i cant connect to facebook or google play or anything to save my progress so if i need a new phone or something, ill have to restart from level 1 again. Other then that its fun. Please fix those problems and ad a way to save the game progress.

I love this game! The graphics are fun and addicting. I gave this game 4 stars for 2 reasons: number 1. I made it to first place in the diamond league and it didn't move me up to another league. So I just keep restarting that league. Number 2. The ads are just ridiculous. After a few times you get it wrong, there's an ad! Next time you get it wrong, ad! And when you finally finish the level, guess what? AN AD!!! But I do recommend this game just be ready for a torture of 30 seconds.

Graphics need to be a bit better... just some quick suggestions. Maybe change the font ingame because it's pretty boring... also there's something that happens when you jump near the edge. The splatter texture goes off the platform... And i think it looks terrible... it would be cool of the part that goes off fell down to the next platform... (Sorry for all of the ...'s, this is an old review and I'm too lazy to get rid of them, nice game though!)

Fun little game, but a couple cons: First, after about level 50 (or something), the levels don't really get any harder, or at least doesn't seem like it to me. (I'm on level 249, and still going strong without much trouble.) Another thing is the game lags quite a bit sometimes. Some levels, it lags the whole way through, others, not at all. It can be really frustrating when you are about to score big, then it freezes and you die when it was not your fault.😐 But other than that, really gg! 🙃

This is an AMAZING game. I like how you have different levels in different colors. I also like how you can change your ball, not to mention the difficulty! The difficulty just slightly increases, do by the time you're level 100 your already a pro! The only problem is how much space if takes up on your phone. 😩😩😩😩 It takes up SO MUCH SPACE!!! Other than that this is a great game, and once I get enough space on my phone, I can download it again! ( Btw, I already had this game before! ) ::--))

I love the game and I was surprised when I found out NOBODY have ever beat it. Google "How many levels are there in Helix Jump" and read the article that is titled "Helix Jump Levels-How many levels are there". It should be the first result. The only thing that drives me insane is when it freezes up in the middle of a level and I die. The controls are awesome on the phone. The graphics are amazing so, cartoonish but at the same time so real. The gameplay is amazing. I recommend geometry dash. 😀

Why I am giving it only 4 stars is because it has ALOT of ads. There are adds everytime you pass a level. They are continuous and highly annoying. The gameplay is excellent and so are the graphics. The idea of the game is truely phenominal but sometimes the controls lag, so that's another reason why I am giving this a 4. The game needs improvments. I thank the creators for making this game. It is a great time killer!

The game is awesome I've had this game for about 2 months and I'm already on level 301. The only problem is that sometimes you can't move the ball and then it moves and messes you up. Also when you want a second chance, after the ad it will make you have no choice to start all over. I will rate this game a 5 if everything is fixed. GET THE GAME!

It's an addictive challanging and fun game and I would play it forever. There are not very many ads. The only reason I rate it 4 stars and not 5 is because it does glitch some times. Also it just could be my phone that is making it glitch so if your reading this just download this game and if you like challenging games this game is perfect for you

The game is really good it's self I'm actually on level 585 but I think the game could use more colors you should make it so where the gamer can chose the colors but also this has happened a few times where I have broken the game not sure if it was just me playing the game to long but pretty sure it's the game but other wise really fun great time killer.

star_5.text: Great and fun time killing game! This game is so much fun where I can't stop playing it and bouncing down and dashing through stuff and avoiding obstacles is just soooo entertaining for my experience. And I am currently on level 12 and trying to get the most coins as I can, and you can choose your own ball into anything! But 1 thing that I don't like is that the levels are just shorter and ends it instantly and moves on to the next level, like I miss it when it's more longer, Anyways, Great Game

the game works. it's pretty, fun, simple. the levels don't get too hard as they go on, so much so that it's impossible. I'm on level 51 and there's not much difference. a lot of ads though. click out of the app and go right back to escape them. there are options for choosing different gaming tools. doesn't seem like a pay-to-play. It takes a lot of work to get the hang of a level (meaning lots of redos) but then you'll get much better. Good graphics too.

Overal simple idea not always so easy to complete. Nice challenge. My only issue may actually be my Samsungs sensitivity or the controls not sure which. Maybe there could be an adjustment similar to the mouse on a Desktop. Otherwise again well worked concept. Time consuming it does require a bit of focus. Though i've noticed the radical change in focus from game to whatever is rather refreshing. Nice job. Not something i easily say.

I'm not really bothered by ads. My only issue is that I can't unlock the last ball. I have all the others but the last one says I've unlocked. The sound button seems to work but restore purchase button doesn't seem to do anything (even though I've never made a purchase, should still bring up something on most apps), and the last one seems to be a Game Center icon for iPhones, but there's nothing for Google? A few peeves but nothing that affects the actual game for me.

So it's a pretty basic game, a good time water but the only reason there are "levels" is because the "level" starts getting more rungs the longer you play. Honestly, since the levels are all procedurally generated but keep dying til it gets easier. I think it would be better as a survival point based game. Also if you don't like ads on mobile games just turn on airplane mode.

Love it! But here are some suggestions that will make you game 10 times better! First, you should give people a choice to customize their labyrinth, like letting them add colors to it, with any color combination. Next, you should add different balls, maybe even like a little shop where you can buy new balls, and like every 20 levels you earn like 50 helix coins. Next, my game bugged out on the ball you earned that says unlock 5 skins. I don't know if this happed to a lot of people, but it happend to me, I would like it if I could still earn that ball, it looks pretty cool, sorry I didn't give you a 5 star review, if it was possible I'd truley give you a 4.5. Keep up the good work!

I love this game so much but... I find this update with the unavoidable green fast arrows makes the game a complete breeze. It is way too easy and the game no longer is a challenge. I think that the next update should definitely have a a way to switch off the mode with the green arrows. Im sure some people love this mode, but personally, it makes the game too easy. Once again, i love this game to death and hope to play it for a long time.

Fun game. I only ever play it when I'm offline so i don't run into any issues with ads. The developers keep adding stuff to make it engaging once you lose interest like the green boost and, of late, the bonus levels that are pretty much free points. It's fun. Sometimes my losses are BS though as something that's barely touching will cause me to lose.

I'll admit: when I first saw the advertisements for this game I thought it'd be pretty stupid, but one day I decided to give it a go and it's really super fun! Casual gameplay but challenging levels, however the levels aren't too challenging. I would like to see some more ball skins, but that's trivial.

The game is very relaxing in times of anger. It also can be used for exercising your fingers, it takes a lot of moving your fingers to be able to pass a lot of levels. I am on level 20 and my friend beat the game. It is really fun game to play if you are bored. I am playing daily and loving it. But it takes time and patience to complete and pass the levels. I got the game when I was looking through the games from voodoo and I found helix jump. It was worth getting and I still play it today! :)!!

This is a really fun cool exiting game. the one problem is there's to many adds. but if You don't have a problem with a little bit to much adds then you should definitely get it. This is one of my favorite games....Plz just make less adds. It's ok if there are a few but.... Plz make less☺☺ again if you don't have a problem with a little much adds... then get this GAME!!!

This is a really good game for if youre bored of just need to pass some time. I love the game, but I'm on level 1,013 and I've noticed that once you're in the thousands in levels the numbers that pop up when you fall down a platform that tell you what added to your score only shows the first 3 digits despite it giving you points in the quadruple digits. just a concern of mine. not too much of a problem.

I love this app so much. The sound is annoying, but can be turned off thankfully. Love the ball selection that it offers, I'm partial to the two ring ball myself. The splat selection is decent, just play with it in one spot to see wgat splat you want. Each level will change with the colors; blues, greens, bkacks, and so on. A nice time passing app. Levels keep going and going... Maybe add more challenge, back and forth motions along with a moving platform and standstill walls. Overall, very fun.

This game is very fun and addicting. It is hard to stop playing! Helix Jump is an amazing game to use as a time killer or to kill time. It can be stressful, but that's mostly when you lose. I love the different colors every round and how you can change what the ball looks like and the splat from the ball. The game doesn't take up much space on your electronic device. Helix Jump is a good game to learn your sense of direction, and how to control your anger. I recomend this game! Good Job!👍👍👍

I LOVE this game! It's an amazing way to kill some time and it isn't difficult to play or to get high scores on. Its a LOT of fun to play any time one wants to spend a couple of minutes playing an easy, well made, and fun little game. It's PERFECT for playing while sitting in a waiting room, taking a break from work, waiting for the bell in between classes, or while waiting for the school bus to arrive. It's perfect for kids of all ages & adults all the same. It really is ONE AWESOME GAME!

I think this game is really cool. It is a very well organized game and has features that are very clever. I also think that the sounds of the ball bouncing and dropping is very satisfying. Although, I think that the boss level should be harder because for me the boss level is easier than the normal levels. And they have WAAAYYYYY too many ads. Like why is there so much? And then they have extra annoying audio ads when you are playing. Minus the INSANE amount of ads, this game is pretty cool.

I enjoy playing this game, and it's really fun to play in my free time! However, I found a really annoying bug. After the completion of any level in the game, the leaderboard glitches and just shows a bunch of "therokk"s. Then the game crashes and becomes unusable until reset. Please fix this. Also, please make the game usable offline!

I love this game! Been playing for god knows how long, I love each ball you can change to, although I do have a favourite! One thing I will ask, is.. I can't get the very last ball, it says I need to unlock 5 skins, but for some reason, even though I have all the "skins" (at least I think I do) it won't unlock.. Please fix this! Also, the game in general does lag a bit, but that doesn't ruin any of the game! Apart from that, amazing game, mega addictive!

Helix Jump is a great time killer, feels like it's only been 10 minutes but you realise it's been 45 minutes. There are ads, and if you don't want to see them, you have 3 options. 1. Buy the premium version. 2. Be skilled because the more you die you get to the end screen where the ads can come. 3. Hack it which is VERY bad to do, as the creator needs ads to get money. I just wanted to make a helpful review, so i hope it helped. :)

The game itself is extremely well designed and both fun and challenging. However, the ads are each 30 seconds long, and they play after every level attempt. All in all, this game is my go-to stress reliever. Having ulitimate control of that little ball and reaching the bottom of each level is very satisfying. UPDATE: Downloaded this game a year ago... Remarkably, as I am notorious for deleting games as soon as I get bored with them, I'm still playing it and still enjoying it.
